# nullcloud_subnet (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud Subnet.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_vpc" "example" {
  name = "my-vpc"
}

resource "nullcloud_subnet" "example" {
  name       = "my-subnet"
  vpc_id     = nullcloud_vpc.example.id
  zone       = "us-east-1"
  cidr_block = "10.0.0.0/24"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr_block` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `vpc_id` (String)
- `zone` (String) Availability zone for the subnet (e.g. us-east-1). Must be a zone within the VPC's region.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
